description:
The FingerSplayModifier takes data from a ``Source``, adding splay data to a copy of that data. The resulting data becomes the pose source data of this component. This component in itself is a IFingerPoseSourceComponent.

For more information on finger pose sources, please see Finger Posing System.

fields.Source: The source data to copy to this component's Finger pose source data.
fields.LeftSplayMagnitude: How much splay data to the left hand to add to the data copied data from ``Source`` during copying.
fields.RightSplayMagnitude: How much splay data on the right hand to add to the data copied data from ``Source`` during copying.

usage: Used as a way of modifying Finger pose data to splay the fingers, and itself be used as new finger pose data.
